task_updates.executor_notes: Added `DatabaseHandler.has_active_payment_or_intent(guild_id, discord_user_id)` with `_gate_check` + supabase guard. Verified `admin_payment_intents` statuses against `sql/admin_payment_intents.sql` and `db_handler.create_admin_payment_intent` before coding: `awaiting_wallet`, `awaiting_test`, `awaiting_confirmation`, `confirmed`, `completed`, `failed`, `cancelled`. The helper treats `completed/failed/cancelled` as terminal for `admin_payment_intents` and `confirmed/failed/manual_hold/cancelled` as terminal for `payment_requests`, matching the batch instructions.

Reworked `PaymentService.request_payment` to be index-aware. Added the `get_payment_requests_by_producer` invariant comment that all statuses are returned. `request_payment` now defines `INDEX_EXCLUDED={'failed','cancelled'}` and `TERMINAL_FOR_RETURN={'confirmed','failed','manual_hold','cancelled'}`, scans prior rows once, blocks different-wallet collisions when any non-index-excluded prior row exists (Branch B: WARN + `on_cap_breach` payload is the prior row + return `None` without insert), only returns an idempotent row when it is active and same-wallet, creates a fresh `manual_hold` row with `last_error='idempotency collision: prior wallet differs'` when only failed/cancelled rows exist (Branch A), and applies the same wallet-mismatch check in the post-insert duplicate reread path. Verified with the full admin payment, social publish, and scheduler modules plus `py_compile`.

Added `DatabaseHandler.get_rolling_24h_payout_usd(guild_id, provider)` returning a float sum of `amount_usd` for non-test `payment_requests` in statuses `pending_confirmation/queued/processing/submitted/confirmed` with `created_at >= now-24h`. The helper comment explicitly documents the residual Supabase REST burst-race window (`~100-500 ms`) and that it depends on T8 persisting derived `amount_usd` for capped amount_token-only callers.

Log audit results: `rg -n "SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY|HELIUS_API_KEY|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|Keypair\.from_bytes|Keypair\(|SolanaClient\(" src -S` returned only env-var lookups in `src/common/llm/claude_client.py`, `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py`, `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py`, `src/features/summarising/subfeatures/news_summary.py`, `src/features/grants/solana_client.py`, and `src/features/payments/solana_provider.py`. `rg -n "HELIUS_API_KEY" src` returned no matches. `rg -ni "logger\..*os\.environ|logger\..*(private_key|secret)" src` returned no matches. Review of `src/features/grants/solana_client.py` and `src/features/payments/solana_provider.py` found no logger call that emits env vars or key material around `Keypair.from_bytes` / `SolanaClient` construction. No leak detected, no code change.

Added the required RLS posture comment block at the very top of `sql/payments.sql`. Verified it covers already-enabled status, service-role-only access via `DatabaseHandler`, revoked `anon/authenticated` access, parameterized writes via `supabase-py`, and the requirement to add explicit policies before changing posture. Diff check confirmed this task is comment-only and added zero `ALTER TABLE` statements.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified `confirm_payment` now rejects when `expected_user_id` is `None`, `confirmed_by_user_id` is `None`, or the IDs differ unless `privileged_override=True`, and each listed call site now has a one-line matching-recipient comment.

Verified `initiate_payment` schema does not accept `wallet_address` / `recipient_wallet` inputs, `execute_initiate_payment` now pops both keys with a WARN log, and the task notes explicitly state the prompt-injection premise was already substantially satisfied.
Ran all required git-history audit commands, recorded the outputs in the task notes, and found no real secret that required stopping execution.

Verified `admin_payment_intents` enum values from `sql/admin_payment_intents.sql` before coding and used the correct non-terminal status predicates for both `payment_requests` and `admin_payment_intents` in `has_active_payment_or_intent`.

Verified `INDEX_EXCLUDED` and `TERMINAL_FOR_RETURN` exist, collision detection runs before same-wallet idempotent return, Branch A inserts `manual_hold` only when all prior rows are failed/cancelled, Branch B returns `None` without insert when any non-excluded prior row exists, and the duplicate reread path also rejects wallet mismatches.

Verified `get_rolling_24h_payout_usd` filters the correct statuses, excludes `is_test` rows, returns a float sum of `amount_usd`, and documents both the residual burst-race window and the T8 persistence dependency.
Completed the required grep-based log audit, confirmed no logger path emits env vars / private keys / secrets, and recorded `no leak detected, no code change`.
Verified the RLS posture block is at the top of `sql/payments.sql`, covers all required points, and the diff is comment-only with no `ALTER TABLE` additions.
